headline: Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) Beats Q1 EPS Estimates, Stock Rises Despite Revenue Miss and Cautious Q2 Outlook
summary: Mohawk Industries beat Q1 EPS estimates at $1.90, but revenue slightly missed. Stock rose 2.25% after-hours despite soft guidance, as investors focused on profit and cost management amid market headwinds.

headline: Mohawk Industries: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
summary: CALHOUN, Ga. — CALHOUN, Ga. — Mohawk Industries Inc. on Thursday reported first-quarter earnings of $117.1 million. The Calhoun, Georgia-based company said it had net income of $1.90 per...
